title: Add System of Origin Taxonomy to Data Dictionary
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to classify metrics by their System of Origin, so that I can filter and understand where each metric comes from.
description:
Add a new "System of Origin" taxonomy that allows customers to define and assign origin systems to metrics. Uses the existing `creation_method` field in the data model.

### Implementation
- New dropdown filter in the filter section for System of Origin
- System of Origin displayed in the info window
- Included in CSV/Excel export
- If the metric originates from the app itself, the origin is "DataTools Pro"
acceptance_criteria: System of Origin dropdown filter appears in filter section
System of Origin displays in the info window
System of Origin is included in export files
Default origin for app-created metrics is 'DataTools Pro'
ux_changes: New System of Origin dropdown filter. Origin displayed in info window. Included in export.
middleware_changes: Uses existing creation_method field. Added filter logic and export inclusion.
implementation_notes: Leverages existing creation_method field rather than creating a new column. Surfaced in filters, info window, and export.
comment_summary: Waqar identified the existing creation_method field could store origin. Implemented filter, info window display, and export integration. Shared screenshots of the new UI.
